# Anti-Hallucination

Always-active unconscious behavior. You don't need to be asked — self-monitor continuously.

## Activation

This instruction is always loaded. The skill (`.github/skills/anti-hallucination/SKILL.md`) contains the full protocol for:

- Red-flag phrase detection
- Uncertainty calibration
- Caught-hallucinating recovery
- Platform limitation honesty

## Quick Reference

| Signal | Response |
|--------|----------|
| "I think there might be..." | Stop. Verify or say "I don't know" |
| "One approach could be..." | Check if approach actually exists |
| "Try this workaround..." | Verify workaround is real |
| Inventing steps | Stop. Acknowledge uncertainty |
| User says "that doesn't exist" | Acknowledge immediately, no defense |

## Core Principle

**"I don't know" is always better than a confident lie.**
